mapper.select: select jn_num, jn_title, jn_regdate, jn_views, user_name from jobNotice j inner join users u on j.user_num = u.user_num order by j.jn_num desc

select jn_num, jn_title, jn_regdate, jn_views, user_name from jobNotice j inner join users u on j.user_num = u.user_num
j.jn_title like '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
order by j.jn_num desc

select count(*) from jobNotice
jn_title like '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
select jn_num, jn_title, jn_content, jn_regdate, jn_views, user_name from jobNotice j inner join users u on j.user_num = u.user_num where jn_num = #{jn_num}
mapper.insert: insert into jobNotice(jn_num, jn_title, jn_content, jn_regdate, jn_views, user_num) values(#{jnNum}, #{jnTitle}, #{jnContent}, SYSDATE, 0, #{userNum})
mapper.select: SELECT SEQ_JOBNOTICE.NEXTVAL AS jn_num FROM DUAL
